user.title: Wrap OIO bulbs
user.description: Select which OIO bulbs to wrap with the circadian render layer. Each wrapped bulb will appear as a single-axis dimmer; the underlying physical light will be hidden.

abort.no_oio_devices: No OIO bulbs found. Make sure your bulbs are added via Matter and report a Korrus/OIO manufacturer string.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Circadian OIO is already configured. Use the integration's Configure button to change which bulbs are wrapped.
